name: neuralaunch

scripts._comment: mobile/ is not a workspace member (see pnpm-workspace.yaml). For mobile commands run: cd mobile && pnpm <cmd>

_pnpm_overrides_reason: zod pinned to 4.1.12: the 4.3.x line tightens generic inference and breaks Inngest's JsonifyObject wrapper on Zod-inferred types that come from a workspace package. inngest pinned to 4.1.1: the 4.2.x release retypes JsonifyObject in a way that no longer collapses passthrough fields, breaking assignability at every Inngest function that reads a StoredRoadmapPhase[] from a step return value. Revisit when Inngest upgrades or when this codebase moves off Inngest's runtime serdes.
